Future Fund::AREC Debt Fund II.author: Oscar Vasquez
Future Fund::AREC Debt Fund II.text: March 17 in-person meeting recap (Fairmont Irvine, Pacific Palisades room). Attendees: Oscar, Tony, Glen, David Hardy, Kevin Van Gorder + Julia McArdle & James McKenzie (Future Fund). KEY TAKEAWAYS: (1) New Exec Director of Property — analytically rigorous, deep APAC experience, raises bar for USD strategies. (2) USD hedge cost is real headwind; US allocations under higher scrutiny but mandate to look remains. (3) Existing Blackstone relationship (credit + equity SMAs) is central comparison — must show AREC is complementary not competitive. (4) Structure open: fund, co-invest, or SMA; Belinda involved on credit optimization. (5) Fund II timeline unlikely but directional guidance in months. (6) Want global credit assessment framework positioning US housing within broader opportunity set. COMMITMENTS: Blackstone comparison deck, competitive landscape, asymmetric return profile, risk-adjusted benchmarks, Japanese builder angle (for new director's APAC background). Builder Forum survey to follow. Offered Japan trip extension to Sydney/Melbourne for follow-up.

UTIMCO - Hedge Fund::AREC Debt Fund II.text: Matt Saverin listened to a call between Jared and his boss.   Jared's boss expressed concern about this being an income play.  At some point, things will go south, and then this becomes a loan-to-own play.  Need to emphasize why we don't think this will happen.  (Get Anthony funnel).
